examples: Yes; then something better, something still grander, will surely follow, or wherefore should they thus ornament me?
"I ask not wherefore, nor how, thou hast fallen into the pit, or say, rather, thou hast ascended to the pedestal of infamy, on which I found thee." He said.
Wherefore? Because I love you not?
Like many strong and smart companies looking to reestablish their why and wherefore, Coca-Cola went back to go forward.
Wherefore his treasure is, there will his heart be, also.
